metadata.title: Table to CSV Exporter
metadata.description: Table to CSV Exporter Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: : (冒号)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: ^ (脱字符)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: ~ (波浪号)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: | (竖线)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: \\t (制表符)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: , (逗号)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: ; (分号)

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Quote data with single quote character (')
ast.target: 使用单引号字符 (') 引用数据

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Quote data with double quote character (")
ast.target: 使用双引号字符 (\") 引用数据

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 不引用数据

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Replace all CR & LF characters with string [CR]
ast.target: 将所有 CR 和 LF 字符替换为字符串 [CR]

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Replace all CR & LF characters with one space
ast.target: 将所有 CR 和 LF 字符替换为一个空格

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 移除所有 CR 和 LF 字符

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the base filename. The "File Number addendum" gets added after that and finally .csv
ast.target: 输入基本文件名。“文件编号后缀”会添加在该名称之后，最后是 .csv。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This number gets added to the base filename and incremented after each export. Normally, you shouldn't need to edit this.
ast.target: 此编号会添加到基本文件名中，并在每次导出后递增。通常，您无需编辑此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This character will be put between each cell's data. Defaults to a semicolon.
ast.target: 此字符将放置在每个单元格的数据之间。默认为分号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do you want quotation marks around each cell's data?
ast.target: 您希望在每个单元格的数据周围添加引号吗？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to handle the occurance of return and linefeed characters in data cells.
ast.target: 选择如何处理数据单元格中出现的回车和换行字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do you want to copy the contents of the CSV file to the system clipboard, too?
ast.target: 您是否也想将 CSV 文件的内容复制到系统剪贴板？

ast.name: setName
ast.target: CSV 文件基本文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件编号后缀

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 数据字段分隔字符/字符串

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 引用数据

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 数据中 CR/LF 的处理方式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 同时复制到剪贴板

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: <输入基本文件名

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an error with copying the contents to the clipboard.
ast.target: 将内容复制到剪贴板时出错。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No table was found. No CSV file was written.
ast.target: 未找到表格。未写入 CSV 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This command only works on panes in reading mode! – No CSV files were written.
ast.target: 此命令仅适用于阅读模式下的窗格！ – 未写入 CSV 文件。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将表格导出为 CSV 文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings for the Table to CSV Plugin.
ast.target: 表格转 CSV 插件的设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: NOTE: Currently, the exported CSV files are saved inside your vault main folder.
ast.target: 注意：目前，导出的 CSV 文件保存在您的仓库主文件夹内。
